buildCommand: export API_BASE_URL="${API_BASE_URL:-https://${VERCEL_URL}}" && if [ -x flutter/bin/flutter ]; then F=flutter/bin/flutter; else F=flutter; fi && $F pub get && $F build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && cp -r build/web/. public/
